description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof, clad in dark brick or tile. The facade features a regular grid of vertically aligned windows, each with white framing, giving the building a modern and orderly appearance. The structure sits on a slightly raised platform or base, which is darker in color and extends slightly beyond the main walls. The windows are symmetrically distributed across all visible sides, with no balconies or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. The main entrance is a single door located centrally on one of the longer sides, accessible from the surrounding paved area. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A modern, rectangular apartment building with dark brick cladding, flat roof, and symmetrically arranged white-framed windows. The structure is functional and unadorned, with a single main entrance and no balconies.
description_view_0: The short end of the building is visible, showing a grid of windows and the dark brick facade, with no visible entrance.
description_view_1: The longer side of the building is shown, featuring multiple rows of symmetrically aligned windows and the main entrance is not visible from this angle.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is visible, mirroring the window arrangement of view 0, with no entrance or additional features.
description_view_3: The other long side is shown, displaying the main entrance door at the center and a similar window arrangement as view 1.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a highly regular, grid-like pattern with even vertical and horizontal spacing, creating a symmetrical and orderly facade on all sides.
